MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-27-2019 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS REGINA STEIN AND VLADIMIR BERENZON'S MOTION TO STAY THE PROCEEDINGS OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE TO SET CASE FOR TRIAL PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 583.110 WAS HEARD. PAVEL KREPKIY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. JAMES HANAWALT, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION TO STAY THE PROCEEDINGS PENDING FINAL RESOLUTION OF THE CRIMINAL ACTION. THE COURT ADVANCED THE CURRENT CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF 02/19/20 TO 10/30/19 AT 10:30AM IN DEPT. 610 FOR STATUS. NOTICE WILL BE SENT BY THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
